result.summary: I found a couple of layout issues where content is visibly cut off on the right side of the page, suggesting the horizontal carousel/tab area is not fitting the viewport cleanly.

issues.description: The top category chip row is clipped on the right, with the 'Hot Games' tab only partially visible ('Hot Ga').
issues.suggestion: Adjust the horizontal spacing or allow proper scrolling/padding so the full tab label is visible within the viewport.

issues.description: Several game tiles in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are partially cut off at the right edge.
issues.suggestion: Fix the carousel/grid width or overflow behavior so tiles are fully visible, or clearly indicate horizontal scrolling if intentional.
